default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy, approvals, and technical access.](https://fathom.video/share/n8ajs8NzKtHyiMyUniYaTbhcFNZVPgza?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Dual-Messaging Strategy:** Panther will use a dual "AI SOC" (future-state) and "SIEM" (current-state) messaging strategy to capture both forward-looking and traditional search intent.](https://fathom.video/share/n8ajs8NzKtHyiMyUniYaTbhcFNZVPgza?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [**Content Approvals:** Approved a new content cluster on "Detection Engineering" and several AI/Agentic AI topics, while deferring others (e.g., ML) as too far from Panther's core focus.](https://fathom.video/share/n8ajs8NzKtHyiMyUniYaTbhcFNZVPgza?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)
  - [**Technical Blockers:** GrowthX is blocked from accessing Google Search Console (GSC), preventing performance tracking. Panther will also provide a channel to monitor production freezes.](https://fathom.video/share/n8ajs8NzKtHyiMyUniYaTbhcFNZVPgza?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [**New Lead Source:** A lead from a ChatGPT search ("AWS Friendly Sims") validates the dual-messaging strategy and will be added to GrowthX's keyword tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/n8ajs8NzKtHyiMyUniYaTbhcFNZVPgza?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)

## Topics

### Messaging & SEO Strategy

  - [**Challenge:** Balance the strategic shift to "AI SOC" with the need to capture traffic from established "SIEM" searches.](https://fathom.video/share/n8ajs8NzKtHyiMyUniYaTbhcFNZVPgza?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [**Solution:** A dual-messaging strategy will be implemented across all content.](https://fathom.video/share/n8ajs8NzKtHyiMyUniYaTbhcFNZVPgza?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This approach captures both traditional search intent and forward-looking interest, aligning with a board-level directive to establish the "AI SOC" category.](https://fathom.video/share/n8ajs8NzKtHyiMyUniYaTbhcFNZVPgza?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
  - [**Tracking:** GrowthX will use its AEO/GEO platform to track performance for both "AI SOC" and "SIEM" keyword sets.](https://fathom.video/share/n8ajs8NzKtHyiMyUniYaTbhcFNZVPgza?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will request a product feature to enable separate, tagged reporting profiles for each keyword set.](https://fathom.video/share/n8ajs8NzKtHyiMyUniYaTbhcFNZVPgza?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)

### Content Approvals & Calendar

  - [**Approved Topics:**](https://fathom.video/share/n8ajs8NzKtHyiMyUniYaTbhcFNZVPgza?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
      - [**AI/Agentic AI:**](https://fathom.video/share/n8ajs8NzKtHyiMyUniYaTbhcFNZVPgza?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
          - ["What is Agentic AI?" → Refocused on security frameworks, architecture, and use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/n8ajs8NzKtHyiMyUniYaTbhcFNZVPgza?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
          - ["Agentic AI Architecture" → A deeper-dive follow-up.](https://fathom.video/share/n8ajs8NzKtHyiMyUniYaTbhcFNZVPgza?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
          - ["Agentic AI and Cybersecurity: What it actually does and doesn't do."](https://fathom.video/share/n8ajs8NzKtHyiMyUniYaTbhcFNZVPgza?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
      - [**Detection Engineering Cluster:**](https://fathom.video/share/n8ajs8NzKtHyiMyUniYaTbhcFNZVPgza?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
          - ["What is a Cyber Kill Chain and how to use it effectively?"](https://fathom.video/share/n8ajs8NzKtHyiMyUniYaTbhcFNZVPgza?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
          - ["What is Threat Detection and Response?"](https://fathom.video/share/n8ajs8NzKtHyiMyUniYaTbhcFNZVPgza?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
          - ["What is Cyber Threat Hunting?"](https://fathom.video/share/n8ajs8NzKtHyiMyUniYaTbhcFNZVPgza?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
          - ["Top Intrusion Detection Systems: A complete comparison guide" → Position as a modern AI SOC alternative.](https://fathom.video/share/n8ajs8NzKtHyiMyUniYaTbhcFNZVPgza?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
          - ["What is Detection Engineering?"](https://fathom.video/share/n8ajs8NzKtHyiMyUniYaTbhcFNZVPgza?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
          - ["What is Host-Based IDS?"](https://fathom.video/share/n8ajs8NzKtHyiMyUniYaTbhcFNZVPgza?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
          - ["What is Infrastructure as Code Security?"](https://fathom.video/share/n8ajs8NzKtHyiMyUniYaTbhcFNZVPgza?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
          - ["What is Managed Detection and Response (MDR)?" → Must mention key partners (e.g., Leticora).](https://fathom.video/share/n8ajs8NzKtHyiMyUniYaTbhcFNZVPgza?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
          - ["What is SecDevOps?" → Title simplified to avoid an unclear "vs." comparison.](https://fathom.video/share/n8ajs8NzKtHyiMyUniYaTbhcFNZVPgza?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
          - ["Everything as Code in Security" → New topic to capture a key customer driver.](https://fathom.video/share/n8ajs8NzKtHyiMyUniYaTbhcFNZVPgza?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)
  - [**Deferred Topics:**](https://fathom.video/share/n8ajs8NzKtHyiMyUniYaTbhcFNZVPgza?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
      - ["Machine Learning and Cybersecurity" → Too far from Panther's core focus.](https://fathom.video/share/n8ajs8NzKtHyiMyUniYaTbhcFNZVPgza?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
      - ["SOAR" (standalone) → Not relevant enough; a "SIEM vs. SOAR" comparison is preferred.](https://fathom.video/share/n8ajs8NzKtHyiMyUniYaTbhcFNZVPgza?tab=summary&timestamp=1437.0)

### Technical & Operational Items
